title: Anticitizen
description: A Minecraft mod about Half Life 2!
body:
GECKOLIB AND FABRIC API ARE REQUIRED FOR THIS MOD TO WORK

Welcome to Anticitizen! A brand new HL2 mod adding armors, weapons and blocks inspired from the Valve game into Minecraft.

Anticitizen is built on Fabric and aims to provide you a handful of content inspired from Half Life 2 and faithfully recreated in Blockbench. This mod is currently 1.20.1 only. We do not have any plans for a Bedrock version.

Currently Anticitizen features:

- Civil protection armor
- Overwatch soldier armor
- Overwatch Shotgun soldier armor
- Civil protection stun baton
- Ration (currently inedible)
- Citizen clothing
- Gman clothing
- Gman suitcase

Need support? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/VpRKZMMpmW) and ask away!
